key.name: device-id
key.description: Random id generated on first run and sent to UMS as DeviceId.

key.name: active-school
key.summary: Id of the currently connected school

key.name: username
key.summary: Username of the saved account (secret lives in the keyring)

key.name: login-method
key.summary: Id of the login method used for the saved account

key.name: custom-name
key.summary: Display name of a hand-entered (Custom) school

key.name: custom-base-url
key.summary: Base URL of a hand-entered (Custom) school

key.name: custom-family
key.summary: Provider family of a hand-entered (Custom) school

key.name: color-scheme
key.description: 0 = follow system, 1 = light, 2 = dark. Applied via AdwStyleManager.

key.name: first-weekday
key.summary: Day the calendar week starts on
key.description: 0 = use the school's default; 1–7 = ISO weekday (1 Monday … 7 Sunday).

key.name: token-valid-until
key.summary: Unix time (seconds) the saved session token is valid until
key.description: From the JWT 'exp' claim. 0 means unknown (no expiry claim); the token is still tried.
